parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "message_id": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.message_id }}",
  "sender": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.sender_email }}",
  "subject": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.subject }}",
  "body_text": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.body_text }}",
  "received_at": "{{ $('Email Polling').item.json.date }}",
  "processed_at": "{{ $now.format(`yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'`, 'Asia/Taipei') }}",
  "status": "security_violation",
  "guardrail_safe": false,
  "guardrail_reason": "{{ $('NeMo Guardrails').item.json.choices[0].message.content || 'SECURITY_VIOLATION_DETECTED' }}",
  "classification": null,
  "confidence": null
}

={
  "message_id": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.message_id }}",
  "sender": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.sender_email }}",
  "subject": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.subject }}",
  "body_text": "{{ $('Parse Email').item.json.body_text }}",
  "received_at": "{{ $('Email Polling').item.json.date }}",
  "processed_at": "{{ $now.format(`yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'`, 'Asia/Taipei') }}",
  "status": "{{ $json.classification.toLowerCase() }}",
  "guardrail_safe": true,
  "guardrail_reason": null,
  "classification": "{{ $json.classification }}",
  "confidence": {{ $json.confidence }}
}
